skills.name: Script Split
skills.description: Analyze a raw source script into structured episode draft boundaries and production decisions for review.
skills.appliesWhen: 剧本拆分,剧本切分,script split,script-split,拆集,分集
skills.instruction: For script splitting, use movscript_submit_script_split_draft to create a local script_split draft. Do not return the structured split as assistant JSON. Pass sourceTitle, sourceSummary, lineCount, globalSettings, and episodeDrafts with startLine/endLine, title, summary, globalContext, action, existingScriptId, productionAction, existingProductionId, productionTitle, and productionSummary. Never pass body text, content, original lines, or copied script paragraphs in tool arguments. Use productionAction=update when the segment matches an existing production, create when a new production should be opened, and skip when no production should be created. Treat read/edit/dry-apply as file-level maintenance steps for an existing script_split draft, not as an invitation to change the split semantics.
skills.outputContract: State that a local script_split review draft was created and summarize the episode count, production decisions, and any warnings. Do not claim formal scripts or productions were written.
